titleStmt.title: SII 5.1354: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1354. (A.R. No. 399 of 1896). ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE IN THE ADHIPURISVARA TEMPLE AT TIRUVORRIYUR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tiru maṉṉi vaḷara Iruṉi[ la maṭant Ai]
yum porccayap pāvaiyuñ cirttaṉic celviyun=ta
ṉ perun=te viyarāki Iṉpuṟa ṉeṭutuyaruḻiyu ḷiṭaitu
ṟaināṭu n tuṭar vaṉavelip paṭar vaṉavāciyuñ cuḷḷi
ccūḻ matiṭak koḷḷippākkaiyum naṇṇa
kkaṟumuraṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakkamum porukaṭa liḻattarai
cartam muṭiyu māṅkavan teviya roṅkeḻil
muṭiyu muṉṉavarpakkal teṉṉavar vaitta cun=ta ra muṭiyu minti ra ṉāramu n=te ṇṭirai
yiḻamaṇṭala muḻuvatu meṟipaṭaik keraḷar muṟaimayiṟ cūṭuṅ kulataṉamākiya pa
lar pukaḻ muṭiyuñ ceṅkatir mālaiyuñ caṅkatir velait tolperuṅ kāvaṟ pala paḻan=ti vuñ ce
ruviṟ ciṉavi Irupattorukālaraicukaḷai kaṭṭa paracurāmaṉ mevaruñcānti- mattivaraṇ karuti yiruttiya
cempoṟ ṟiruttaku muṭiyum payaṅkoṭu paḻimika muyaṅkiyil mutukiṭ ṭoḷitta cayaciṅka ṉaḷapperum puka
ḻoṭu piṭiya yiraṭṭapāṭi yeḻaraiyilakkamum ṉavaṉetikula perumalaikaḷum vikkiramavira cakkarakoṭṭamum
mutirvaṭavalla maturamaṇṭalamuṅ kāmiṭaivaḷar ṉāmaṇaiykkoṇamu veñcilaivirar pañcappaḷḷiyum pā
1 Between lines 4 and 5 there are a few letters which are not intelligible. The metre, however does not re�uire those syllables to complete the verse.

cuṭaip paḻaṉa mācuṇitecamu mayarvil vaṇkirtti yātiṉakaravayiṟ can=ti raṉ ṟolkulat tinti rarataṉai viḷa
yamark kaḷattuk kiḷayoṭum piṭittu pala taṉattoṭu ṉiṟaikula taṉakkuvaiyum kiṭṭaruñ cerimuḷai
yoṭṭavi[ṣai]yamum pūcurarcer ṉalkkocalaiṉāṭum taṉmapālaṉai vemmuṉai yaḻittu vaṇṭuṟai colait taṇṭa
puttiyu miraṇacūrar muraṇukat tākki tikkaṇakirttit takkaṇalāṭamuṅ kovin=ta can=ta r māviḻi n=to ṭat taṅkāta cāral vaṅkāḷatecamum
toṭukaṭaṟcaṅ koṭṭa mahipālaṉai veñcamar viḷākat tañcuvittaruḷi Oṇṭiṟal yāṉaiyum peṇṭir (paṇṭā)paṇṭāramu
m nittila neṭu caṅkirā
mavicaiyottuṅkavarmma ṉākiya kaṭārattaracaṉai vākayam porukaṭakkumpak kariyoṭu makappaṭut turimaiyil
piṟakkiya peruṉetip pirakkamu mārttaṉakkanka porttoḻil vācalil vidyādha ratoraṇamu mottoḷip puṉama
ṇip putavamum kaṉamaṇik katavu niṟai civicaiyamum tuṟainir paṉṉaiyum ṉaṉ[malaiyūreyiṟ ṟoṉmalaiyūru māḻkaṭa
lakaḻcūḻ māyiruṭiṅkamuṅ kalaṅkā valviṉai Ilaṅkācopamuṅ kāpperu ṉiṟaipuṉal māpappāḷamuṅ kā
valampuricai meviyampaṅkamu miḷaippain tūruṭai vaḷaippain tūṟuṅ kalaittakkor pukaḻ talaittakkola
mu n=ti tamāvalviṉai mātavaliṅkamuṅ kalāmutir kaṭun=ti ra lilāmuritecamu n=te ṉakkalārpoḻil māṉakkavāramu n=to ṭuka
ṭaṟ kāvaṟ kaṭumuraṭ kaṭāramu māpporu taṇṭāṟ koṇṭa kopparakesariparmma- rāṉa Uṭaiyār śrīrājendracoḷade varkku
yāṇṭu muppattoṉṟāvatu [jayaṅkoṇṭa maṇṭala]ttu puḻaṟkoṭṭattu puḻalṉāṭṭu tiruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiya mahāde varkku
Uṭaiyār śrīrājendracoḷade var tiruṉāḷ mārkaḻit tiruvātirai ṉāṉṟu ṉey yāṭiyaruḷa veṇṭu micattukku tiruvoṟṟiyūr tirumayā
ṉamu maṭamuṭaiya caturānanapaṇḍi taṉde varpaṇṭārattu vaitta kācu ṉūṟṟaimapatu Ikkācu ṉūṟṟaimpatuṅ koṇṭaruḷa śrī
tevatāṉam viḷānāṭṭukkuṭi tiripuvaṉacun=ta racceri maṉṟāṭikaḷukku camain=ta maṉṟāṭi Emmur jaya
maṉṟāṭiyum cūṟṟi Eṭṭikāṭi ttikkāraṉum kaliyaṉ paṭṭaṉu maṉṟāṭi nilaṉ kollaṉum
koyilpaṭṭaṉum parātakaṉ cālaṉum cūṟṟi koṅkaṉum
ṅkaṉum māvali cūṟṟiyum ciṟuṉampi tta kuppaṉ kaṇavatiyum cūṟṟi kuṟumpaṉum Uḷḷiṭṭa maṉṟāṭikaḷom
mikkācu nūṟṟaimpatum koṇṭa paricāvatu Oṉṟarai kācukoḷḷum pacuvoṉṟāka kācu ṉūṟṟaimpatu miṭṭu ṉūṟu pacu cāvāmuvā
ppacuvāka koṇṭu [candrā] tittavaraiyum Āṭṭāṇṭutoṟum pacuvoṉṟiṉukku Arumoḻitevaṉāḻiyāl muṉṉāḻi ṉey
yāka pacu ṉūṟiṉukku muṉṉūṟṟu ṉāḻi ṉey mārkaḻit tiruvātirai ṉāṉṟu pacuviṉeyye koṭuvan tu tevarpaṇṭāratte Aḷa
ppomāṉom tiripuvaṉacun=ta racceri maṉṟāṭikaḷukku camain=ta maṉṟāṭikaḷ meṟpaṭiyom .
Digital edition of SII 5.1354 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
